title: Protein Extraction from Cell Pallets
author: Jacob Waldbauer
license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.b4btqsnn
materials: make 1M DTT stock solution in LC/MS water.

steps.title: Make 1X LDS buffer
steps.instruction: Make 1X LDS buffer. In 40mL of 1X buffer, add Tris HCl 0.666g, Tris base 0.682g, LDS 0.8g, EDTA 0.006g, Glycerol 4g.

steps.title: Add 200~500uL of 10mM DTT in...
steps.instruction: Add 200~500uL of 10mM DTT in 1X LDS buffer to the cell pallet tube.

steps.title: Heat sample up at 95ºC for 20 minutes
steps.instruction: Heat sample up at 95ºC for 20 minutes.

steps.title: Cool down the sample to room temrature
steps.instruction: Cool down the sample to room temrature. Meanwhile, make a 0.5M iodoacetamide stock solution.

steps.title: Add IAM to 50mM/60mM in the...
steps.instruction: Add IAM to 50mM/60mM in the sample, incubate in dark for 30-60minutes.

steps.title: Add DTT to 50mM/60mM
steps.instruction: Add DTT to 50mM/60mM. Sampe is ready to continue with FASP.
